title: Ava's Manhunt Starter
description:
Don't you hate how slow it is to start a manhunt recording?

Well fear not!  This solves that.
body:
# PLEASE NOTE!
## THIS IS NOT A COMPASS ADDON
**This datapack/mod is used ALONGSIDE compass addons etc!  Its purpose is to help make the preperation of recordings easier. Not just for the video's consistancy or the runner's sanity, but for the hunters too!**



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JUgOU7rw4tk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## YOU MUST DO THIS IN ORDER FOR THE DATAPACK TO WORK BEST!
**This is due to Mojang locking some datapack permissions behind server.properties!**


```
1. Open your server files
2. Head to "server.properties"
3. Set "function-permission-level=" to 3 or 4 AT LEAST!
4. Reset your server and then it's done!
```


# Command Functions!

* **/function manhunt:start_food**

This command does the following:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
Set all player spawnpoints to the executer's coordinates.
Clears all players, and then kills them.
Immediatly respawns all players. (does not enable doImmediateRespawn.)
Sets time to 250. (The best time for videos!)
Puts all players into survival mode.
Gives all players max saturation.
Reminds players to reset chat with F3 + D.
Clears weather.
Resets all advancements.
```

</details>



* **/function manhunt:start_nofood**

This command does the following:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
Same as manhunt:start_food, but does not give players saturation
This is helpful incase you feel like that is cheating, or bad for videos.
```

</details>



* **/function manhunt:pause**

This command does the following:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
Set the following player attributes to -1:
---------------
Attack Damage
Attack Speed
Interaction Range
Movement Speed
Jump Strength
---------------
Prevents players from losing air. (Does not use water breathing.)
Freezes the game with /tick freeze.
```

</details>



* **/function manhunt:pause_notick**

This command does the following:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
This does the exact same command as manhunt:pause, but does not use /tick freeze.
It is unrecommended to use this command, but if you have not enabled server permissions, it will be your only option.

Gives all mobs Slowness 255 + Resistance 255 + Weakness 255
Gives all players Resistance 255
```

</details>



* **/function manhunt:unpause**

This command does the following:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
Reverses the changes of manhunt:pause
```

</details>



* **/function manhunt:unpause_notick**

This command does the following:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
Reverses the changes of manhunt:pause_notick
(The reason this method is worse is due to it clearing Resistance from players, which may of been applied from an Enchanted Golden Apple, or something else.)
```

</details>

## Message "avaasusual." on Discord to report any issues please!
